summary: Iteration 102: UI reorganization testing for contact detail page - Feed/Details tabs, merged tags+automations strip, stats bar with clicks. All features verified working correctly. Backend API returns link_clicks field. Frontend displays correct stats order (touches, msgs, clicks, campaigns, referrals). Edit mode shows all required form sections.

backend.test_stats_api_link_clicks: PASS - GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/stats returns link_clicks field (value: 0-3 depending on contact)

frontend.tab_bar_feed_details: PASS - Feed and Details tabs visible in tab bar
frontend.feed_tab_suggested_actions: PASS - Suggested Actions section present when actions exist
frontend.feed_tab_relationship_intel: PASS - Relationship Intel pill visible with last update time
frontend.feed_tab_pinned_notes: PASS - Pinned notes show in feed when notes exist (visible in UI)
frontend.feed_tab_activity_feed: PASS - Activity section with event count (50 events), Log Customer Reply, Search
frontend.feed_tab_conversations_link: PASS - View Conversation link present at bottom of feed
frontend.details_tab_voice_notes: PASS - Voice Notes section with recording capability and transcripts
frontend.details_tab_notes: PASS - Notes section displays contact notes
frontend.details_tab_important_dates: PASS - Important Dates section shows Birthday, Anniversary, Date Sold
frontend.details_tab_referrals: PASS - Referrals section visible when referral data exists
frontend.details_tab_campaigns: PASS - Campaigns section shows enrolled campaigns with step progress
frontend.tags_automations_strip: PASS - Merged horizontal scrollable strip with tags (VIP, Hot Lead, Out of State), automation date chips (Birthday Jun 1, Anniversary Nov 7, Sold Date May 10), campaign chips
frontend.stats_bar_order: PASS - Stats bar shows: touches · msgs · clicks · campaigns · referrals (correct order)
frontend.stats_bar_clicks_field: PASS - 'clicks' stat visible in stats bar (shows 3 clicks for Forest Ward)
frontend.edit_mode_basic_info: PASS - Basic Info section with First Name, Last Name, Phone, Email, Vehicle, Address
frontend.edit_mode_tags: PASS - Tags section with removable tags and Add button
frontend.edit_mode_important_dates: PASS - Important Dates with Birthday, Anniversary, Date Sold, Add Custom Date
frontend.edit_mode_referral: PASS - Referral section with Select referrer
frontend.edit_mode_notes: PASS - Notes section with text area
frontend.composer_visible: PASS - Composer remains visible at bottom on both Feed and Details tabs

critical_code_review_comments: UI reorganization well implemented - 12 sections consolidated into Feed/Details tabs
Stats bar correctly shows 5 stats in order: touches, msgs, clicks, campaigns, referrals (lines 1457-1481)
Tags and automations merged into single horizontal scrollable strip (lines 1487-1557)
Tab state managed via contactTab state variable (line 304)
Feed tab shows: Suggested Actions, Relationship Intel, Pinned Notes, Activity Feed, Conversations Link
Details tab shows: Voice Notes, Notes, Important Dates, Referrals, Campaigns
Edit mode properly shows: Basic Info, Tags, Important Dates, Referral, Notes forms
Backend stats endpoint includes link_clicks field (lines 470-478 in contact_events.py)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Forest Ward contact with rich data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact detail page reorganization complete. Feed tab contains activity-focused content (Suggested Actions, Intel, Pinned Notes, Activity Feed, View Conversation). Details tab contains static info (Voice Notes, Notes, Important Dates, Referrals, Campaigns). Tags and automation date chips merged into single scrollable strip above tabs. Stats bar shows 5 stats including clicks. Edit mode unchanged - shows Basic Info, Tags, Important Dates, Referral, Notes. Composer visible on both tabs.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Twilio SMS is mocked, personal SMS flow opens native SMS app
